title: LNE Wizards Add-On
description: Loot & Explore Add-On with Wizards (RPG-Series ) related Content, like new Structures, Weapons etc.
body:
## LNE x Wizards (RPG-Series) Add-On💎🧙‍♂️
![Frost Wizard Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vukREL4F/images/5f0f777ea60b17a95f236d521946b3f7ee891bba.png)
      

## 📂 Installation
### 🚨Required Mods
- [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) (RPG-Series)
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)

### 🤝Integrated Compatibility
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) ( Additional Wizard Staves)
- [Elemental Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-wizards-rpg)

## 🕹️ Features
- Loot & Explore is only a optional Dependency, if you dont want the special wizard Staves and just want the class related structures, you dont have to install the L&E Mod, or you can disable the equipment in the config.

## ⚔️Equipment
- Special Staves can be crafted with new Smithing Template Upgrades (Only if Loot & Explore is installed)
- Each staff has their own unique passive ability🪄
![Special Wizard Staves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vukREL4F/images/69b17817ac7c92188d3a70f34aaeeb0d5123b60b.png)

## 🏚️Structures
- Find new Wizard related Structures while exploring!
- Loot the chests and get rewarded with Wizard related equipment
- You can rarely find Wizard Spell Books with bound spells in these structures
![Arcane Wizard Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vukREL4F/images/c7dac8ed7934ceab08f26696ed30d21b3bc61168.png)

## 🎥 Showcases


## 🧑‍🔧Roadmap
- More Wizard related Structures
- 1.21.x Port 
- New Wizard Spells & Spell Books
- Wizard Themed Enemies
- New Spells/Spell Books for each class
- More Special Wizard Staves

## 🙌Credits
- Deadelus - for creating the Wizards Mod and inspiring this Add-On
- [Emil](https://emil.art/) for creating the cute Mod Icon's

Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :)
